prompt: Render a computer graphics scene showing a 3D modeling software interface on a laptop screen (from image 2), focused on creating a clothing game asset inspired by the shirt in image 1. Include digital tools and wireframe view.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphics scene showing a 3D modeling software interface. This interface should be displayed on the screen of a silver laptop, similar in appearance and perspective to the laptop in image 2. The software's main viewport should focus on creating a 3D game asset: a long-sleeved, collared button-up shirt, directly inspired by the salmon-pink checkered design and style of the shirt in image 1. Ensure the interface prominently features digital modeling tools, menus, and a clear wireframe render of the shirt asset within its workspace.
objects: silver laptop (similar appearance and perspective to laptop in image 2)
3D game asset: long-sleeved, collared button-up shirt
salmon-pink checkered design and style on the shirt asset (inspired by image 1)
clear wireframe render of the shirt asset (within its workspace)
